renames.rationale: Strings list every SERVICE_CONTROL_* notification token (NETBINDCHANGE, PRESHUTDOWN, SESSIONCHANGE, POWEREVENT, TRIGGEREVENT); uses operator_new + vector-destructor, looks like construction of a service-control event handler registry.

Only strings are ACDC_POWER_SOURCE and BATTERY_PERCENTAGE (PBT_POWERSETTINGCHANGE GUID names); same construction pattern as 140001020 (operator_new + vector destructor) — registers power-event sub-handlers.
Tiny CRT init thunk calling _Init_locks then atexit — classic per-TU C++ runtime locale/locks initializer.
Identical shape to 1400014e0 (calls _Init_locks then atexit); second-TU duplicate CRT lock initializer.
Constructs a CAtlBaseModule and registers atexit; canonical ATL global-module per-TU initializer.
Single callee is __std_exception_destroy; this is the standard C++ exception-object destructor stub for a derived exception class.
Contains the literal 'bad array new length' twice and is called only by 140001670 which itself calls _CxxThrowException — inner helper that builds the std::bad_array_new_length object.
Calls 140001640 (bad-array-new-length constructor) then _CxxThrowException; called from dozens of allocation sites — the canonical __scrt_throw_std_bad_array_new_length helper.
Sole callee is __std_exception_copy; 17-instruction copy constructor for a std::exception-derived type.
Same shape as 140001690 (single __std_exception_copy call, 17 insns) — copy constructor for a sibling exception class.

Strings 'log.dll', '\log.dll' plus the full LogInit/LogApplySettings/LogSetSettingsFile/LogEnable/LogWrite/LogTrackEvent export list; callees LoadLibraryW + GetProcAddress + GetModuleFileNameW — dynamically loads log.dll and binds its function pointers.
Tiny (20 insns) wrapper whose only callee is _guard_dispatch_icall; called from 20+ different functions — looks like a small CFG-guarded indirect-call thunk for a virtual-method dispatch.
Only string is 'string too long' and the function tail-calls FUN_14002d6f4 — canonical std::_Xlength_error('string too long') throw helper called from string/container length checks.
